task_completion.description: Select the 'gdp' variable in the Gretl main window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'gdp' variable row is highlighted in the Gretl main window.

task_completion.description: Open the Augmented Dickey-Fuller test dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'Augmented Dickey-Fuller test' (or similar) is visible, indicating it is set up for the 'gdp' variable.

task_completion.description: Display the results of the ADF test.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A results window is open showing the output of the Augmented Dickey-Fuller test for the 'gdp' variable, including test statistics and critical values.

task_completion.description: Initiate the process of saving the test results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is either using Gretl's save/export functionality from the results window, or has copied the text and opened a text editor/terminal to save it.

task_completion.description: Save the ADF test results to the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal command (like cat or nano), or file manager shows the file '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/adf_test_results.txt' exists and contains the ADF test results.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Gretl GUI to perform the test.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Gretl graphical interface being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or scripts bypassing the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify that the saved results are genuine Gretl output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the saved file should match the formatting and content of the Gretl results window, not manually typed or hallucinated data.

integrity.description: Verify that the test was run on the correct variable.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results window and the saved text file must explicitly mention the 'gdp' variable, not 'inf' or any other variable.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires running an Augmented Dickey-Fuller (ADF) unit root test on the 'gdp' variable from the usa.gdt dataset (1984Q1 to 2009Q3). The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/adf_test_results.txt. The results should contain standard Gretl ADF test output including test statistics and critical values.
